# Test mcpdiff with notifications
exec go build -o mcpdiff .

# Test diffing files with notifications
exec ./mcpdiff notif1.mcp notif2.mcp
stdout 'notification'

-- notif1.mcp --
# mcptrace:v1
mcp-recv {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05"}}
mcp-send {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"result":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}}}
mcp-send {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"notifications/progress","params":{"progress":50,"total":100}}

-- notif2.mcp --
# mcptrace:v1
mcp-recv {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05"}}
mcp-send {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"result":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}}}
mcp-send {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"notifications/progress","params":{"progress":75,"total":100}}
